content.en:
Square Algorithms (2+1)

Algs by Yiqun Fan

112 to 122 Block, Roux FBFS (First Block First Square) (Fan' Square). Cases are named by X1X2X3, where X1 is blue sticker on white-blue-red corner, X2 is blue sticker on blue-red edge, X2 is blue sticker on white-blue edge. Avg = 3.20. First solve 112 block and put it on F layer (one can do do x*).
